name: blazor-lexical-js
description: Dev-only build sources for the Blazor.Lexical RCL bundle. Not shipped.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --strict --skipLibCheck --moduleResolution bundler --module esnext --target es2020 --lib es2020,dom src/index.ts src/extension.ts src/overlays.ts src/table.ts src/markdown.ts src/mentions.ts src/toc.ts src/marks.ts src/highlights.ts src/stats.ts src/hr.ts src/tabindent.ts
